summary: Comprehensive testing of ForgePilot completed successfully. All major features working including start screen, project creation, AI chat with streaming, code generation, file management, and workspace functionality.

minor_bugs.issue: POST method returns 405 Method Not Allowed
minor_bugs.impact: Direct message creation via API fails, but chat streaming works fine

ui_bugs.issue: Code editor textarea selector not found in some cases

passed_tests: Start screen loads with German prompt 'Was möchtest du bauen?'
Project type selection (Full Stack App, Mobile App, Landing Page)
New project creation through input and submit
Workspace loads with complete Agent Timeline (7 agents)
Chat with AI Agent - Streaming Response working
Code generation creates files (index.html, styles.css, app.js)
All tabs functional (Preview, Editor, Logs, Roadmap)
GitHub Import Dialog opens and works
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fixes needed: 1) Fix POST /api/projects/{project_id}/messages endpoint returning 405, 2) Ensure code editor textarea selector is consistent. Overall system is working excellently.
